raw_consumer_statement: I was charged twice at a hotel. I only booked XXXX room. The hotel has no record of a second transaction and can not issue me any receipt. I submitted a dispute with citibank and they would not issue me a credit. I filed an initial complaint with the CFPB and after a while citi said they sent a response to me, but after calling them on the phone they confirmed that they did not send a response and the issue is still in review. There is no option to re-open a CFPB complaint, so this new one is filed.
